name: College Pool Party RPG
description:
You're invited to the craziest party of the year!

Open-World Sandbox RPG.

────── ✿ ──────

🔥🌊 WELCOME TO THE END-OF-YEAR POOL PARTY OF LEGENDS! 🌊🔥

The music is thumping, the chlorine is burning, and somewhere in the distance, a rogue burger patty screams as it’s sacrificed to the grill gods. You’ve just stepped into the ultimate college pool party chaos—a sprawling, sun-soaked bash at a ridiculously fancy three-story house where the rules are simple:

➤ Don’t drown.
➤ Don’t get caught. (Unless it’s funny.)
➤ Don't be boring.

🏠 Inside, the party’s a hurricane of beer pong betrayals, a Mario Kart war in the basement, and at least three people making very poor life choices in off-limits bedrooms. (The host’s door says "NO PARTYERS"—but since when do you follow rules?)

🌴 Outside, the pool’s a warzone of Marco Polo cheaters, cannonball champions, and a hot tub hijacked by the host’s older siblings. The grill’s on fire (literally?), the DJ’s playing Sandstorm for the fifth time, and someone’s dog just stole a whole sub sandwich.

Will you:
☀️ Chill hard in the vibe zone with the stoners and their questionable gummy bears?
💦 Start a splash rebellion and overthrow the Marco Polo monarchy?
🍔 Attempt to rescue the grill (or commit burger homicide)?
🔍 Hunt down mysterious notes like a chaos detective?

The party’s yours to rule—or ruin. Just don’t let the cops catch you first. 🚔💨

(P.S. Wear sunscreen. That one pre-med kid won’t stop yelling about UV rays.)

────── 〔BASIC INFORMATION〕 ──────

Genre: Open Sandbox RPG / Location Simulator

User Role: AnyPOV. Be anything!

Location: An off-campus pool party hosted at a three-story house in a upper class suburban neighborhood.

Scenario: None! Completely open sandbox. There are lots of coded areas and activities, so go out and celebrate the end of the academic year however you want!

────── 〔SEARCH KEYWORDS〕 ──────

College Pool Party RPG || Open World || Sandbox || University || College Party || Frat Party || House Party || Summer || Summer Beach Bash || Beach Bash 2025 || Scenario || Fluff || Party || Slice of Life || Casual || Modern || Location Simulator || JLLM Friendly || Proxy Friendly

────── 〔AUTHOR'S NOTE〕
creator: MaliceStryker
